briefs.title: BC Voluntary Self-Exclusion Rules for Gambling Get Formal Legal Terms Starting April 2026
briefs.summary: BC's Gaming Control Act now requires the lottery corporation to include specific terms in self-exclusion agreements (contracts where a person voluntarily bans themselves from gambling). The rules take effect April 13, 2026, and cover in-person casinos and online gaming.
briefs.action_required: If you operate a BC gaming or casino facility, review the new self-exclusion agreement terms before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Voluntary Self-Exclusion Regulation takes effect — Gaming Control Act
